title: Application Deadline 2026
shortDesc: The deadline for the upcoming winter semester is approaching.
fullDesc: The deadline for the upcoming winter semester is approaching. Please ensure all documents, including your learning agreement and transcripts, are submitted via the portal by 23:59 CET.

title: Welcome Orientation
shortDesc: Join us in the main hall for the international student mixer.
fullDesc: Join us in the main hall for the international student mixer and welcome gala. Food and drinks will be provided. Attendance is mandatory for new incoming students.

title: Language Course Enrollment
shortDesc: Sign up for intensive English and Turkish courses now.
fullDesc: Language proficiency is key to a successful Erasmus experience. We are offering free intensive courses starting next month. Register at the International Office.

title: Erasmus+ Grant Payments
shortDesc: Information regarding the first installment of your grants.
fullDesc: The first 70% of the Erasmus+ grant will be transferred to your accounts within 15 days of your arrival confirmation. Please ensure your IBAN is correct in the system.

title: Staff Training Week
shortDesc: Registration is now open for the Annual Staff Mobility week.
fullDesc: We invite our partner university staff to join us for a week of networking, workshops, and cultural exchange focusing on digital transformation in education.

title: City Sightseeing Tour
shortDesc: Explore the historic landmarks of the city this Saturday.
fullDesc: A guided bus tour will depart from the North Campus at 09:00 AM. We will visit the major historical sites and end with a group lunch by the river.

title: Housing Portal Updates
shortDesc: New dormitory spots have been released for the spring term.
fullDesc: Due to a high volume of requests, we have secured additional rooms in the university annex. Please apply via the housing portal by Friday.

title: Research Fellowship Call
shortDesc: Open call for PhD students interested in satellite networking.
fullDesc: The Engineering Department is looking for 3 PhD candidates for a joint research project on LEO satellite constellations. Stipends are available for qualified applicants.

title: Intercultural Workshop
shortDesc: How to adapt to your new environment effectively.
fullDesc: This workshop covers cultural shock, local customs, and social etiquette to help you integrate faster into the campus community.

title: Travel Reimbursement Notice
shortDesc: Submit your boarding passes for green travel top-ups.
fullDesc: Students who used sustainable means of transport (train, bus, carpool) are eligible for a one-time payment of 50 EUR. Upload your tickets by the end of the month.

title: Library Extended Hours
shortDesc: The central library will now stay open 24/7 during finals.
fullDesc: To support students during the examination period, the library and study halls will be accessible 24 hours a day starting next Monday.

title: Erasmus Farewell Party
shortDesc: Celebrate the end of the semester with us!
fullDesc: Join us for music, awards, and a farewell dinner as we celebrate the memories made this semester. Dress code: Formal/Traditional.

title: BIP: Renewable Energy Systems
shortDesc: Join our blended program with partners from Italy and Spain.
fullDesc: This Blended Intensive Program combines 3 days of online lectures with 5 days of hands-on physical mobility. Focus on solar and wind energy integration in modern grids.

title: IT Maintenance Window
shortDesc: The student portal will be offline for 4 hours this Sunday.
fullDesc: We are upgrading our servers to improve loading speeds for the Erasmus application portal. Access will be restricted from 02:00 AM to 06:00 AM.

title: Digital Skills Workshop
shortDesc: Master the tools needed for modern engineering projects.
fullDesc: Learn advanced CAD techniques and project management software. This workshop is open to all engineering and architecture students.

title: Sustainable Campus Initiative
shortDesc: New recycling stations installed across all departments.
fullDesc: In line with the Green Erasmus initiative, we have launched a new waste management system. Check the map for your nearest recycling point.

title: Summer Internship Fair
shortDesc: Meet local and international companies for summer placements.
fullDesc: Over 40 companies will be present to discuss traineeship mobility and internship opportunities for the upcoming summer break.

title: Exam Registration Reminder
shortDesc: Final date to register for the June examination period.
fullDesc: Please double-check your course enrollments. Students not registered via the automation system will not be admitted to final exams.

title: Partner University Spotlight
shortDesc: Discover our new agreements with universities in France.
fullDesc: We have expanded our network! Learn about our three new partner institutions in Paris and Lyon for the next academic cycle.

title: Travel Grant Final Call
shortDesc: Last chance to claim travel support for late arrivals.
fullDesc: If you arrived after the main orientation and have not yet filed for travel support, please visit the International Office by Friday.
